parameters.description: Controls the time window shown across all tiles. Defaults to the last 30 days to capture the full rollout of PR #27126.
The date PR #27126 (telemetry sampling) was deployed to Bohemia/Outlook Web Production. Used by the Before/After comparison tile. Update this value after confirming the deployment date.

tiles.title: 📊 All Sampled Events — Volume Over Time (by Event)

query.text:
// Overview: each tracked event as its own series. Decreasing lines indicate sampling is taking effect.
// Note: the sampledEvents list below is intentionally repeated in each tile query because ADX dashboards
// do not support shared let-clauses across tiles. To add/remove events, update all tiles together.
let sampledEvents = dynamic([
    "fluid:telemetry:BlobManager:AttachmentBlobsLoaded",
    "fluid:telemetry:CodeLoad_end",
    "fluid:telemetry:ConfigRead",
    "fluid:telemetry:Container:noWaitOnDisconnected",
    "fluid:telemetry:ContainerRuntime:ConfigRead",
    "fluid:telemetry:DeviceSpec",
    "fluid:telemetry:FluidDataStoreRuntime:ddsEventCallbacks",
    "fluid:telemetry:FluidDataStoreRuntime:ddsOpProcessing",
    "fluid:telemetry:OdspDriver:CacheOpsRetrieved",
    "fluid:telemetry:OdspDriver:GetDeltas_end",
    "fluid:telemetry:OpPerf:ConnectionSpeed"
]);
client_event
| where EventInfo_Time between (_startTime .. _endTime)
| where EventName in ("BohemiaLogger_Perf", "BohemiaLogger_Event")
| extend data = parse_json(MiscData)
| extend eventName = tostring(data.eventName)
| where eventName in (sampledEvents)
| summarize EventCount = count() by bin(EventInfo_Time, 1d), eventName
| render timechart with (title="Events logged per day — split by event name")

tiles.title: 📉 Total Sampled Event Volume — All Events Combined

query.text:
// Total volume across all 11 events. A downward trend confirms that PR #27126 sampling is reducing telemetry noise.
let sampledEvents = dynamic([
    "fluid:telemetry:BlobManager:AttachmentBlobsLoaded",
    "fluid:telemetry:CodeLoad_end",
    "fluid:telemetry:ConfigRead",
    "fluid:telemetry:Container:noWaitOnDisconnected",
    "fluid:telemetry:ContainerRuntime:ConfigRead",
    "fluid:telemetry:DeviceSpec",
    "fluid:telemetry:FluidDataStoreRuntime:ddsEventCallbacks",
    "fluid:telemetry:FluidDataStoreRuntime:ddsOpProcessing",
    "fluid:telemetry:OdspDriver:CacheOpsRetrieved",
    "fluid:telemetry:OdspDriver:GetDeltas_end",
    "fluid:telemetry:OpPerf:ConnectionSpeed"
]);
client_event
| where EventInfo_Time between (_startTime .. _endTime)
| where EventName in ("BohemiaLogger_Perf", "BohemiaLogger_Event")
| extend data = parse_json(MiscData)
| extend eventName = tostring(data.eventName)
| where eventName in (sampledEvents)
| summarize TotalCount = count() by bin(EventInfo_Time, 1d)
| render timechart with (title="Total events logged per day (all 11 events)")

tiles.title: 🔬 Sampling Effectiveness — Logged Events vs. Actual Operations

query.text:
// The 'count' field in each sampled event tells how many real operations were batched into one log entry.
// AvgSamplingRatio > 1 means sampling is active. Higher = more aggressive sampling.
let sampledEvents = dynamic([
    "fluid:telemetry:BlobManager:AttachmentBlobsLoaded",
    "fluid:telemetry:CodeLoad_end",
    "fluid:telemetry:ConfigRead",
    "fluid:telemetry:Container:noWaitOnDisconnected",
    "fluid:telemetry:ContainerRuntime:ConfigRead",
    "fluid:telemetry:DeviceSpec",
    "fluid:telemetry:FluidDataStoreRuntime:ddsEventCallbacks",
    "fluid:telemetry:FluidDataStoreRuntime:ddsOpProcessing",
    "fluid:telemetry:OdspDriver:CacheOpsRetrieved",
    "fluid:telemetry:OdspDriver:GetDeltas_end",
    "fluid:telemetry:OpPerf:ConnectionSpeed"
]);
client_event
| where EventInfo_Time between (_startTime .. _endTime)
| where EventName in ("BohemiaLogger_Perf", "BohemiaLogger_Event")
| extend data = parse_json(MiscData)
| extend eventName = tostring(data.eventName)
| where eventName in (sampledEvents)
| extend sampledCount = toint(coalesce(data.count, data.Count, 1))
| summarize
    EventsLogged     = count(),
    TotalOperations  = sum(sampledCount),
    AvgSamplingRatio = round(avg(sampledCount), 1)
  by eventName
| sort by AvgSamplingRatio desc
| project
    ["Event Name"] = eventName,
    ["Events Logged"] = EventsLogged,
    ["Total Operations"] = TotalOperations,
    ["Avg Sampling Ratio"] = AvgSamplingRatio

tiles.title: 📋 Before / After PR #27126 — Event Count Comparison (±7 days)

query.text:
// Compares the 7-day window before vs. after PR #27126 deployment.
// Set the 'PR #27126 Deploy Date' dashboard parameter to the actual date the change reached Bohemia/Production.
let sampledEvents = dynamic([
    "fluid:telemetry:BlobManager:AttachmentBlobsLoaded",
    "fluid:telemetry:CodeLoad_end",
    "fluid:telemetry:ConfigRead",
    "fluid:telemetry:Container:noWaitOnDisconnected",
    "fluid:telemetry:ContainerRuntime:ConfigRead",
    "fluid:telemetry:DeviceSpec",
    "fluid:telemetry:FluidDataStoreRuntime:ddsEventCallbacks",
    "fluid:telemetry:FluidDataStoreRuntime:ddsOpProcessing",
    "fluid:telemetry:OdspDriver:CacheOpsRetrieved",
    "fluid:telemetry:OdspDriver:GetDeltas_end",
    "fluid:telemetry:OpPerf:ConnectionSpeed"
]);
let beforeWindow = client_event
    | where EventInfo_Time between ((_prDeployDate - 7d) .. _prDeployDate)
    | where EventName in ("BohemiaLogger_Perf", "BohemiaLogger_Event")
    | extend data = parse_json(MiscData)
    | extend eventName = tostring(data.eventName)
    | where eventName in (sampledEvents)
    | summarize CountBefore = count() by eventName;
let afterWindow = client_event
    | where EventInfo_Time between (_prDeployDate .. (_prDeployDate + 7d))
    | where EventName in ("BohemiaLogger_Perf", "BohemiaLogger_Event")
    | extend data = parse_json(MiscData)
    | extend eventName = tostring(data.eventName)
    | where eventName in (sampledEvents)
    | summarize CountAfter = count() by eventName;
beforeWindow
| join kind=fullouter afterWindow on eventName
| project
    ["Event Name"]     = coalesce(eventName, eventName1),
    ["Before (7d)"]   = coalesce(CountBefore, 0),
    ["After (7d)"]    = coalesce(CountAfter, 0),
    ["Change %"]      = round((todouble(coalesce(CountAfter, 0)) - todouble(coalesce(CountBefore, 0)))
                              / todouble(max_of(coalesce(CountBefore, 1), 1)) * 100, 1)
| sort by ["Change %"] asc

client_event
| where EventInfo_Time between (_startTime .. _endTime)
| where EventName in ("BohemiaLogger_Perf", "BohemiaLogger_Event")
| extend data = parse_json(MiscData)
| where tostring(data.eventName) == "fluid:telemetry:BlobManager:AttachmentBlobsLoaded"
| summarize EventCount = count() by bin(EventInfo_Time, 1d)
| render timechart

tiles.title: 🔍 Hourly Breakdown — All Sampled Events (last 7 days)

query.text:
// Finer-grained hourly view to see intraday patterns or abrupt drops after a deployment.
let sampledEvents = dynamic([
    "fluid:telemetry:BlobManager:AttachmentBlobsLoaded",
    "fluid:telemetry:CodeLoad_end",
    "fluid:telemetry:ConfigRead",
    "fluid:telemetry:Container:noWaitOnDisconnected",
    "fluid:telemetry:ContainerRuntime:ConfigRead",
    "fluid:telemetry:DeviceSpec",
    "fluid:telemetry:FluidDataStoreRuntime:ddsEventCallbacks",
    "fluid:telemetry:FluidDataStoreRuntime:ddsOpProcessing",
    "fluid:telemetry:OdspDriver:CacheOpsRetrieved",
    "fluid:telemetry:OdspDriver:GetDeltas_end",
    "fluid:telemetry:OpPerf:ConnectionSpeed"
]);
client_event
| where EventInfo_Time > ago(7d)
| where EventName in ("BohemiaLogger_Perf", "BohemiaLogger_Event")
| extend data = parse_json(MiscData)
| extend eventName = tostring(data.eventName)
| where eventName in (sampledEvents)
| summarize EventCount = count() by bin(EventInfo_Time, 1h), eventName
| render timechart with (title="Hourly event count — last 7 days")
